name: io.allourthings/mcp-server
description: AI-powered household inventory — query everything you own via natural language

environmentVariables.name: ALLOURTHINGS_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where inventory data is stored. Defaults to ~/Documents/AllOurThings.

packageArguments.name: --data-dir
packageArguments.description: Directory where inventory data is stored. Alternative to ALLOURTHINGS_DATA_DIR env var.
